title: polystichum glandulosum
intro: Polystichum glandulosum, also known as the glandular polystichum, is a species of fern native to the Himalayas and other parts of Asia. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Polystichum glandulosum include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and act as an antidote for snake bites. Herbal preparations of Polystichum glandulosum include infusions and decoctions, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
